title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Sasken Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Sasken Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sasken Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sasken Technologies:
Sasken Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies!
